message:
feat(beads): add 15 new feature epics with comprehensive planning

This commit adds 15 new feature epics (98 beads total) identified through
systematic idea-wizard methodology as maximally accretive improvements to
FrankenTUI that are NOT currently implemented or planned.

## New Feature Epics

### Core UX Infrastructure (P1)
- bd-2mc1: Semantic Event System - High-level gesture recognition
- bd-1n5t: Focus Management - Keyboard navigation graph with trapping
- bd-3tmk: Notification/Toast - Queue-managed notifications with animations
- bd-1nac: Undo/Redo - Command pattern with transaction grouping
- bd-39vx: Modal/Dialog - Stacking modals with focus management

### Enhanced Widgets (P2)
- bd-130l: Responsive Breakpoints - Tailwind-style responsive layouts
- bd-34pj: Form Validation - Sync/async validation with error display
- bd-1csc: Drag-and-Drop - Mouse and keyboard drag with previews

### Platform Features (P2)
- bd-ic6i: Internationalization - String catalogs, RTL, BiDi text
- bd-30g1: State Persistence - Widget state save/restore across sessions
- bd-k4lj: Capability Simulator - Terminal profile simulation for testing
- bd-2qbx: Contextual Help - Tooltips, keybinding hints, guided tours
- bd-2ueu: Embedded Terminal - Full PTY terminal widget

### Advanced Patterns (P2)
- bd-2my1: Reactive Data Bindings - Observable values with computed derivations
- bd-1i67: Animation Choreographer - Timeline-based animation composition

## Structure Per Epic

Each epic contains 6-7 tasks:
- .1: Core data structure/trait with full Rust API specification
- .2: Main implementation with file locations
- .3-.4: Feature components with unit test names
- .5: Demo integration and snapshot tests
- .6: Comprehensive E2E test suite with:
  - Multiple test scenario files
  - Logging requirements (INFO/DEBUG/TRACE)
  - Script locations (scripts/e2e/<feature>/)
  - Success metrics and CI integration

## Dependency Graph

Internal dependencies properly sequenced within each epic.
Cross-epic dependencies established:
- Focus Management <- Modal/Dialog, Help System, Form Validation
- Semantic Events <- Focus Management, Drag-and-Drop
- Animation Timing (bd-3bix) <- Toast, Modal, Choreographer

## API Specifications Added

Key implementation tasks enhanced with:
- Complete Rust struct/trait definitions
- Implementation strategies and patterns
- Named unit tests for each component
- Performance requirements and complexity analysis
- File locations within crate structure

## Validation

- No dependency cycles (verified via bv --robot-insights)
- All metrics computed successfully
- Proper parent-child relationships maintained

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
